chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. B. A. No.2045 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1.For order on MA No. 10984/25 (urgent) 2.For order on MA No. 10985/25 (exemption) 3.For hearing of bail application 05.08.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Advocate a/w five Applicants Rehan Ahmed, Irfan Ali, Farhan, Kamran Ahmed and Zeeshan Ahmed all sons of Shafi Muhammad ---------- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all exceptions. 3. Five Applicants namely Rehan Ahmed (CNIC No.41306- 3208493-9), Irfan Ali (CNIC No.41306-1535117-1), Farhan (CNIC No.41306-3346315-1), Kamran Ahmed (CNIC No.41306-1630212-1) and Zeeshan Ahmed (CNIC No.41306-5335278-1) all sons of Shafi Muhammad are present along with their Counsel to seek protective bail to enable them to appear before the Trial Court for seeking appropriate relief. Learned counsel for applicants submits that applicant are innocent and have been falsely implicated by the complainant in Crime No.213/2025 of PS Bithai Nagar, Hyderabad, under Sections 324, 504, 337-H, 337A, 337F and apprehend their arrest and humiliation at the hands of police and it is difficult for them to approach the concerned Court for getting appropriate relief as such they have appeared before this Court for seeking protective bail. Without touching merits of the case, above named five applicants are granted protective bail for 10 days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.20,000/- (Rupees twenty thousand only) each and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court. This protective bail shall remain in force for 10 days from today or the date on which the applicants will surrender before the trial court, whichever is earlier.

Without touching merits of the case, above named five applicants are granted protective bail for 10 days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.20,000/- (Rupees twenty thousand only) each and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court. This protective bail shall remain in force for 10 days from today or the date on which the applicants will surrender before the trial court, whichever is earlier. The protective bail application is disposed of. J U D G E Asif
